An easy way to generate YouTube titles, descriptions, and chapters:

1. Upload your video unlisted, and give YouTube time to transcribe it
2. Copy the transcription over to GPT-4 and ask it for a title, description, tweet, and chapters.
3. Copy the chapters into YT description https://t.co/GeYJmbZvzh
